since_last: 70% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.99%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +1.56% · Gold +1.41% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 70% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.99%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.99%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.72%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +6.87%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +6.87%, MRVL +6.77%, MU +6.05%, TER +5.76%, INTC +5.56%. Laggards: ADBE -3.91%, WDAY -3.54%, INTU -3.00%, DV -2.85%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.65% at $121.83
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.65% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
